sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41788" key="e)pokrio/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποκρῐ-όεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n41788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uneven, projecting,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στέρνα,</foreign> of a skeleton, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.401</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
